mapper.select:
SELECT -- board b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
-- member (작성자) m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
-- member_profile (작성자 프로필) mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
-- board_type bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_is_deleted = 'N' AND b.mem_idx = #{mem_idx} ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_idx = #{board_idx}
mapper.insert:
SELECT nextval('board_board_idx_seq')
INSERT INTO board ( board_idx, mem_idx, board_title, board_content, board_ip, board_tag, board_thumbnail, board_readhit, board_type_idx, board_regdate ) VALUES ( #{board_idx}, #{mem_idx}, #{board_title}, #{board_content}, #{board_ip}, #{board_tag}, #{board_thumbnail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 0, #{board_type_idx}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE board SET board_title = #{board_title}, board_content = #{board_content}, board_tag = #{board_tag}, board_thumbnail = #{board_thumbnail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, board_moddate = NOW() WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx}
UPDATE board SET board_is_deleted = 'Y', board_deldate = NOW() WHERE board_idx = #{board_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT board_type_idx FROM board_type WHERE UPPER(board_type_code) = UPPER(#{board_type_code})

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE bt.board_type_code = #{board_type_code} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N' ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE bt.board_type_code = #{board_type_code} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.board_tag = #{board_tag}
ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE b.board_idx = #{board_idx} AND bt.board_type_code = #{board_type_code} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'

SELECT b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE bt.board_type_code = #{board_type_code} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.board_tag = #{board_tag}
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.board_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.board_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC

SELECT COALESCE(COUNT(*), 0) FROM board b JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE bt.board_type_code = #{board_type_code} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.board_tag = #{board_tag}
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.board_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.board_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY b.board_idx DESC) AS no,
-- board b.board_idx, b.mem_idx, b.board_title, b.board_content, b.board_ip, b.board_tag, b.board_thumbnail, b.board_readhit, b.board_type_idx, b.board_regdate, b.board_moddate, b.board_is_deleted, b.board_deldate,
-- member (작성자) m.mem_idx AS writer_mem_idx, m.mem_id AS writer_mem_id, m.mem_name AS writer_mem_name, m.mem_role_idx AS writer_mem_role_idx,
-- member_profile (작성자 프로필) mp.mem_idx AS writer_profile_mem_idx, mp.mem_nickname AS writer_profile_nickname, mp.mem_intro AS writer_profile_intro, mp.mem_img AS writer_profile_img,
-- board_type bt.board_type_idx AS bt_idx, bt.board_type_code AS bt_code, bt.board_type_name AS bt_name, bt.board_can_comment AS bt_can_comment, bt.board_min_role AS bt_min_role
FROM board b JOIN member m ON b.mem_idx = m.mem_idx LEFT JOIN member_profile mp ON m.mem_idx = mp.mem_idx JOIN board_type bt ON b.board_type_idx = bt.board_type_idx WHERE bt.board_type_code = #{board_type_code} AND b.board_is_deleted = 'N'
AND b.board_tag = #{board_tag}
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND b.board_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND ( b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR b.board_content LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
) WHERE no BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}
SELECT board_min_role FROM board_type WHERE UPPER(board_type_code) = UPPER(#{board_type_code})
